ngai028.r4f1.sr05.wdc07 Et58/1 | R::wdc3-qz1-sr5-rk472-s12 37 | Link error

https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C09BNFN4LUW/p1765290520881399


@nre-team - Zyphra has isolated node wdc3-qz1-sr5-rk472-s12 which has been seeing a high error count on:
ngai028.r4f1.sr05.wdc07 Et58/1 | R::wdc3-qz1-sr5-rk472-s12 37
The link has only flapped once, but is showing frequent uncorrected errors, from their end, so needs to be inspected and cleaned.  Should just need to address this single link - not the entire system.
